title: Digger-Mod
description: A mod that adds the Digger item which will help you in caves by digging 3x3 and a few more nice things.
body:
# Digger Mod
It's a mod I made for me and my friends to play with!

It contains some things they asked me to add, but first of all it's a mod that is helpful for digging!

## What is this mod about?
Just imagine. You are digging in caves and you really need to make a great hallway for your underground base. So that's exactly when The Digger comes out! It's a new instrument which you can use to dig 3x3 holes.

![Almost everything mod has](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da2b061f8df75881a3800bf492fe901e886085b.png)

![Mod stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bcb9d0614025f9155c1914655fd7b98e2d69375.png)

## What does this mod has?
- Wind Ore
- Wind Stone (item)
- The Digger
- Wind Salt
- New effect
- And a lot more! (Some things are only avaliable in Creative mode)

### Digger's craft recipe:

![Digger's recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b76517f504b435bbfb4f346afc1b8cb18bc9251.png)

## Some Screenshots:
### **Digger usage:**
Use it like a pickaxe to dig 3x3!

![Digger item Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/290b30a8dfe5b4d1bbc64989bee5567d4717fea6.png)

### **My friend as a block!**
He is a fox. =D

![Mello_fox appeared!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82fe2c6a8be1ae2127f6a1ee2fb87bcca45ca788_0.webp)
![Holes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b7aee2a3f6010ef5f3716a091099d56b140fa5e_0.webp)

### **Wind ore!**

![Wind ore in the caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fb98fa4ad94ab36b7752fc1184a35165c8f120b_0.webp)

### **Using:**
It's not very hard to download this mod. Just install this in your mods folder along with [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

This is my first mod and I hope you enjoy it! Have fun!
